framework.name: AI-Augmented Governance Layer
framework.description: Modular intelligence system that integrates AI into DAO workflows to enhance coordination, transparency, and operational efficiency without replacing human oversight. Uses composable modules for analytical components, decision trees, and workflow automation.
framework.raw_quote: ENGMA aims to serve as a modular intelligence layer that developers and ecosystems can integrate into their governance stacks, allowing AI supported logic to complement human voting and strategic planning
